overall.description: A static shot of a medieval stone tavern or guild hall interior from a fantasy video game. The scene features gothic architecture with massive stone pillars, round windows with blue glass, and NPCs gathered around wooden tables under warm torchlight.

circular patterned stone tile flooring covering the ground

segments.scene_description: A static view of a medieval stone tavern interior with gothic architecture. Massive stone pillars rise to support the ceiling while round windows with blue glass sit high on the far wall. Several NPCs sit at wooden tables or stand near the columns, illuminated by a warm wall sconce on the left. The camera remains completely stationary throughout the clip.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, atmospheric view of a medieval stone tavern that maintains a consistent mood of gothic grandeur. It begins with a wide perspective of the interior, where massive stone pillars rise to support a high ceiling. The gaze lingers on the far wall, where round windows of blue glass contrast with the interior's heavy masonry. As the scene unfolds, the focus remains on the NPCs gathered at wooden tables and near the columns, all bathed in the steady, warm glow of a wall sconce on the left. The camera stays completely stationary, preserving the stillness of the guild hall throughout the sequence.
